assertions.title: a key opens in-TUI add MCP form

steps.action: Focus MCPs pane, open MCP list, press a
steps.expected: Add MCP form appears with fields for name, command, args
steps.observed: Add flow appeared as Step 1 Name, Step 2 Command, Step 3 Args

steps.action: Fill name/command/args and submit from review
steps.observed: MCP list count increased from 6 to 7 and API sidecar includes newly created MCP entry after submit

steps.action: Return to MCP list after submit

evidence.network: Inferred POST /api/mcp-connections by before/after API sidecars and new MCP row created immediately after submit

assertions.issues: Field carry-over bug observed in review (command and args prefixed with name), but contract pass criteria still met.

steps.action: Press r on selected error MCP
steps.observed: Immediate transition to ⏳ connecting with 'Reconnecting...' status

steps.expected: Reconnect attempt completes with updated state
steps.observed: Row transitioned to 🟢 active with 'Reconnected successfully' banner

evidence.network: Reconnect API call not directly intercepted in TUI, but UI transition and API after-state confirm reconnect mutation

frictions.description: From dashboard shell, Enter acted on currently focused pane; needed explicit MCP pane focus before opening MCP manager list.
frictions.resolution: Used deterministic focus sequence and MCP-specific snapshots before proceeding.

frictions.description: Expected wait text in automation differed from actual heading ('Add MCP — Step 1: Name' instead of 'Add MCP Connection').
frictions.resolution: Adjusted wait target to the actual rendered heading and continued flow.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. A-MCP-UI-04 met pass criteria (form visible, submit created new MCP, list updated) with an observed field carry-over defect; A-MCP-UI-05 showed reconnect transition from error to connecting to active.
